profile.name: Giovanni Ciaramella
profile.title: Ph.D. Student in Cybersecurity @IMT Lucca & Associate Researcher @IIT-CNR Pisa
profile.summary: Ph.D. student in Cybersecurity at IMT School for Advanced Studies Lucca and Associate Researcher at IIT-CNR Pisa. Expertise in front-end development and proficiency in Python, Java, JavaScript, and SQL. Research focuses on Cybersecurity and Malware Analysis for Android and Windows, utilizing Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Federated Learning.

education.institution: IMT School for Advanced Studies Lucca
education.details: Curriculum: Software, system and infrastructure security.

experience.details: Analyzing threats in Android, IoT, and Windows using Federated Learning and Quantum ML.
Taught 'Mobile and Cloud Security' module for the Level I Master in Cybersecurity. Focused on Android programming and mobile ecosystem security.
Researched malware detection for mobile systems under the 'CyberSec Pro' program.

Designated expert for multiple degree programs including Medical Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Medicine and Surgery, Sports Science, and Law, New Technologies and Security. Co-supervisor for numerous B.Sc. and M.Sc. theses.

awards.title: Best Paper Award (2022)
awards.details: 'Introducing Quantum Computing in Mobile Malware Detection' presented at Workshop FARES, Vienna.
